creator: duerrd561@gmail.com
text:
Hi Navdeep,

Thanks for the response!  Are you recommending that I stop specifying "media 10Gbase-T mediaopt full-duplex rxcsum txcsum" from now on across the board?  Or just for the test?  I come from the old(er) days where one would disable auto-negotiation and be really specific about media, speeds, etc.  Maybe these are a thing of the past with 10Gbps NICs?

Best,
Daniel
